decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, limiting visibility into conditions. With only $477 in cash — just below the $500 threshold required to open new positions — no new buys are warranted. All six existing positions are held; INOD, our strongest screener candidate (score 95), is already in the portfolio and continues showing bullish momentum.

market_education.summary_en: Market direction data was unavailable today, with both the NASDAQ and S&P 500 reporting flat movement and no live price feeds accessible. Without concrete macro catalysts or headline data to act on, the prudent stance is to hold existing positions rather than trade on incomplete information. In the absence of news-driven signals, momentum indicators on existing holdings like INOD remain the primary guide.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據無法獲取，納斯達克與標普500均報持平，缺乏即時行情參考。在無具體宏觀催化劑或新聞面支撐的情況下，持有現有倉位而非貿然交易是較為穩健的做法。在消息面訊號缺席的環境下，現有持倉（如INOD）的動能指標仍是主要參考依據。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Keeping a cash buffer in your portfolio isn't idle money — it's 'dry powder' that lets you act quickly when high-conviction opportunities appear. Today's situation illustrates why: with only $477 available (just under the $500 threshold), we can't open any meaningful new positions even though four slots are open and several strong candidates exist on the screener.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 在投資組合中保留現金緩衝並非閒置資金，而是所謂的「備用彈藥」，讓你在出現高確信機會時能夠迅速行動。今日情況正好說明這一點：帳戶僅餘477美元現金（略低於500美元的建倉門檻），即使有四個空餘倉位及多檔強勁候選股，也無法開立任何具意義的新倉。
